title: [Griffin's Keen, Western Track]
description: The difficult path clings to the mountainside, sloping acutely.  A lone bush grows right out of the mountain face, and the rocky trail is speckled with clumps of wet snow.

wayto.3986: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'down'
